zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Helen Campbell於1460年6月21日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素時，她的父親Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass15歲，母親Marion Houston27歲。她於1478年4月20日與Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1528年1月23日在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭法爾吉可艾爾斯艾爾斯 卡素 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Helen Campbell于1460年6月21日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素时，她的父亲Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass15岁，母亲Marion Houston27岁。她于1478年4月20日与Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie在英国苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1528年1月23日在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰法爾吉可艾爾斯艾爾斯 卡素 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Helen Campbell was born on 21 June 1460, in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass, was 15 and her mother, Marion Houston, was 27. She married Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie on 20 April 1478, in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 23 January 1528, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Helen Campbell est née le 21 juin 1460, à Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Marion Houston, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie le 20 avril 1478, à Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1528, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Helen Campbell am 21. Juni 1460 in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass 15 und ihre Mutter Marion Houston 27. Sie hat am 20. April 1478 in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Januar 1528 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie il 20 aprile 1478, nel Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Campbellが1460年6月21日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントン カストルで生まれた時，父Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglassは15歳，母Marion Houstonは27歳であった。1478年4月20日にイギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアドラーでSir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1528年1月23日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドファルキルクエイルスエイルス カストル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, S: 영국 스코틀랜드 파커크 어스 어스 카스틀 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Campbell(이)가 1460년 6월 21일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Houston(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1478년 4월 20일 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르 돌라에서 Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1528년 1월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 파커크 어스 어스 카스틀 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.21 June 1460–23 January 1528: 21 de junho de 1460–23 de janeiro de 1528
pt.Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, S: Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, Uni: Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.Eglinton Castle, Kilwinning, Ayrshire, S: Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helen Campbell nasceu em 21 de junho de 1460, em Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Marion Houston, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie em 20 de abril de 1478, em Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1528, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, S: эирт кастл кеметири, эирт, фалкирк, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Helen Campbell родилась 21 июня 1460 г. в местности эглинтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Houston, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie 20 апреля 1478 г. в местности доллар, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 23 января 1528 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности эирт кастл кеметири, эирт, фалкирк, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Helen Campbell nació el 21 de junio de 1460, en Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Colin Mor Campbell 3rd of Ardkinglass, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Marion Houston, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie el 20 de abril de 1478, en Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1528, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Airth Castle Cemetery, Airth, Falkirk, Escocia, Reino Unido.
